folio.label: 42r
folio.l: ¢ This Carpentä a woke , and herd hi~ syng

note.notetxt: 178The first line of the folio isin a light ink, perhaps copied well before the rest of the page was done.ODR

folio.l: And spak vn to his wyf , and seide a non
What Alisou~ , herest æè nat Absolouö
That chaunteth thus , vnder oure boures walle
And she answered hire husbond , there w alle
ñis god wot Ioún , I here it euäy dele
This passeth fortú , what wyl ©e bet than wele
Fro day to day , this Ioly Absolouö
So wougheth hire , that hi~ is woo bygonö
He waketh al the nygút , and al the day
He kembeth hise lokkes brode , & mad hi~ gay
He wougheth hire by menes , and brocage
And swor he wolde ben , hire owen page
He syngeth brokkyng , as a Nyghttyngale
And sent hire pyment , Meth & Spiced ale
And waferes pypyng hote , ou©t of the glede
And for she was of Toune , he profred mede
For so~me folk , wol be woxnewo~newo~xnen for richesse
And so~me for strokes , and so~me for gentilnesse
Somtyme to shewen , his ligútnesse and maistrye
He pleyeth Heraudes , vp on a skaffold heye
¢ But what a vailletú hi~ , as in this cas
She loueth so , this hende Nicholas
That Absolouö may blowe , the bukkes hornö
He ne had for his labour , but a skornö
And thus she maketh , Absolouö hire Ape
And al his ernest , turneth to a Iape
Ful soth is this ¸uäbe , it is no lye
Men seyn rigút thus , alwey the nye slye
Maketh the fer leef , to be loth
For thougú æ Absolouö , be wood or wroth
By cause æ he fer was , from hire sigút
This nye Nicholas , stod in his ligút
¢ Now bere the wel , thow hende Nicholas
For Absolouö may waylle , and synge allas
And so byfel it , that on a Saterday
This Carpentä , was gon to Osney
And hende Nicholas , and Alisouö
Accorded ben , to this conclusiouö
That Nicholas , shal shapen hem a wyle
The sely Ielous husbonde , to begyle
And if so be , the game went a rigút
